title: Catering Kitchen Supervisor
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Saybons is a casual French cafe chain with catering facilities, known for their media acclaimed French soups served in a cup and delicious savoury and sweet crepes. With a mission to make good French food accessible to everyone, Saybons offers not just a cafe experience in their retail outlets, but also full catering services, breakfast catering, live crepe stations and egg stations, as well as drop off buffet menus and French lunch boxes for both private and corporate sessions. Visit Saybons, or let the Saybons chef bring an unique and affordable French dining experience to you! Saybons is the retail brand name created and wholly owned by French Food Factory Pte Ltd.

Job Summary

Grow with our catering operations team, supporting high volume production of buffets, bentos and live stations. Actual work involves supervising kitchen operations, ensuring food quality, hygiene compliance and timely preparation of catering orders.

Responsibilities

  • Lead daily kitchen operations and deploy staff effectively to meet production demands and maintain operational efficiency
  • Ensure all food preparation strictly follows Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) and halal requirements to guarantee compliance and quality standards
  • Monitor food quality by conducting regular checks on taste, appearance, and freshness to uphold customer satisfaction
  • Control portion sizes and manage food wastage to optimize cost efficiency and resource utilization
  • Coordinate with logistics and sales teams to ensure timely readiness and smooth execution of catering events
  • Enforce cleanliness and safety protocols in the kitchen environment to maintain hygiene standards and comply with health regulations
